feature_name: UInt8, UInt16, UInt32, UInt64, UInt128, UInt256, Int8, Int16, Int32, Int64, Int128, Int256
sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_numeric (id UInt32, value Int16) ENGINE = Memory;
UPDATE test_numeric SET value = value + Int16(10) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value, UInt8(value) AS unsigned_value FROM test_numeric WHERE value > Int16(0);
SELECT AVG(value) as average_value FROM test_numeric WHERE value < Int16(0);
